name: The Temple of Fractured Light
description: A crystalline cathedral where refracted mana light paints ever-shifting patterns across the walls, and the priests commune with echoes of the Silent Gods. Those who meditate here too long sometimes hear whispers that follow them home.

properties.deity: The Silent Gods — primarily Vethara, the Veiled
properties.notableArtifact: The Fracture Lens — said to reveal truths hidden from mortal eyes
